title: rubus dubius
intro: Rubus dubius, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or false raspberry, is a species of plant that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus dubius include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestive health, and reduce the risk of certain cancers due to its high content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. Rubus dubius is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application for skin issues such as eczema and wounds.
